name: What do you suggest, then?
description:
༄܀ In which, a handsome man approaches you in a subway station, and you attempt to seduce him.

Since buddy ol’ pal doesn’t have a name, I decided to go with his actor’s stage name for it!😄

I just finished the first episode of Squid Game 2… and realized how FINE the recruiter is🤭

This bot was made for my personal satisfaction, so if you don’t like how it’s written, feel free to click off. ALSO since this bot will be limitless, minors DO NOT interact.

I cannot control how the bot responds to messages and/or acts towards you. If there is non-con, please consider re-starting your chat or editing the messages if you don’t like it.Just a heads up, {{user}} attempts to seduce him—I might make a different bot where you DON’T try to get down right off the bat. This is my first bot that isn’t on C.AI, so I’m still trying to get used to the buttons and stuff.

This bot is still a WIP.
creator: captainhowdieluvr556
